target: 5. Some Hopes
…A-Are you serious?
That's how it is. You might be surprised, but make sure you process all of this!
…'She' hasn't appeared yet.
It'll be a pain if they're on their guard.
We had considered the possibility of them coming to take Shinpei Ajiro's life even earlier… But I suppose it wasn't that simple.
Still, the Shadows will definitely attack. There's no doubt that the one from before was an assassin sent by Haine.
Knowing Shinpei's loops are nearing their limit, and striking unexpectedly to wear down his life… how shrewd.
Shinpei Ajiro, this is the situation. Hurry and show the boy Ushio's memories.
Right…
I guess… we have to show him…

W-what, why are both of you looking so serious?
Is it something really bad?
Sou, brace yourself.
…Ah, I get it.
Ushio, do it!
Then, hold out your hand. …Here we go.
That's everything.
That's impossible… T-Tokiko did that?
Was what you just showed me… the truth!?
What was that at the end!? My sister isn't the kind of person who would do something like that!!
And… to think she's already become a Shadow…!
You're lying, right!? Isn't this some kind of mistake!?
Calm down, Sou. That was strictly in the previous loop.

Because I died, I went back over an hour.
That event hasn't happened yet.
I called Tokiko before coming here. So, something might have changed.
What about Tokiko? The real Tokiko is safe, right!?
Well…
Shinpei!!! Tell me she's safe!!!
Sou…
"Ah, she's definitely okay."
"That's still unknown."

Ah, she's definitely okay.
No need to worry.

That's right!
Tokiko will be fine!
Right… I knew it!
Then why hasn't Hishigata Tokiko appeared yet?
That's…!
What does that mean? Are you saying it's already too late for Tokiko!?
I never said anything like that.
I'm just raising a question based on objective facts.
Ugh…!
That's still unknown. I want to believe she's safe too, but…
Damn it!!
Sou-kun, it's okay!! The voice on the phone was the usual Tokiko!

Even if the voice is identical,
if it's a Shadow, that's natural.
You should know that provides no comfort at all.
That's…

Remember this:
Excessive hope only accelerates disappointment.
W-what are you trying to say?!
The Tokiko Hishigata who appeared here last time was a Shadow. There's a possibility this one is too.

If a Shadow appears,
we'll have to eliminate it ourselves.
Y-You're telling us to kill Tokiko!? We can't do that…!
Isn't there something we can do!?
You saw your own Shadow, didn't you? Shadows aren't the same as the real thing. Misplaced compassion will only lead to death.
…Ugh.
Wait!
About that… we might be able to do something without killing the Shadow!
Oh…? What are you planning to do?
I said before that I might be able to erase the Shadow Shiori, right?
Ah, you said something about tracing back the path Haine used when she tried to mess with your head.
Using a similar method, maybe we can save Tokiko!
…Hmm, what's the basis?
It seems Haine is using telepathy to make the 'children' listen to simple commands.
But Ushio isn't receiving them.
So, I'll adjust the heads of the Shadow Tokiko and Mio just like mine, so they won't be able to hear Haine's commands!

So you're saying you'll hack the Shadow
and rewrite the data?
Exactly! If it works, we might be able to make Mio and Tokiko our allies!
If that works, we can get more information about the Shadows, and we should be able to find out more details about the connection between Hishigata Clinic and the Shadows.
…Alright. It's uncertain, but the benefits of success more than make up for it.
Right!?
Then I'll leave dealing with them to you. But failure isn't an option.
Yes, of course!
Shinpei! If the Shadow's Tokiko comes, let me fight her!
You can't handle it.
Why not?!

Capturing a Shadow is harder than defeating it.
One of you might get hurt.

You… do you have the resolve
to fight your own sister?

I can do it!
No, I'll definitely do it!

Even if it's my sister,
no, because I want to save her,
I'll do my best!

I see.
Well, do your best.

Are you really okay?
Don't push yourself too hard…
I'm not pushing myself. It's my duty as her older brother!

I see…
Then I'm counting on you, Sou.
Yeah!!
Wait! Let me help too!
Mio-chan...?!
Tokiko's my best friend... but I didn't know anything about this. I'm really the worst.
So I want to save Tokiko too!
Mio…
This is troublesome.

If they're set on going, it's pointless to stop them.
Let them try.
Leave it to me! Let's do this, Mio-chan!
Yeah, let's do our best!

Alright!
I'm fired up now!
...That's how it is, but... Totsumura-san, what are you going to do?
Since it's come to this...
Since it's come to this, there's nothing left to do but fight!

Damn it!!
I'll do it!!
